places.name: Vrindavan — Radha Krishna
places.modernInfo: The Brahmavaivarta Purana focuses on the eternal love of Radha and Krishna. Banke Bihari and Radha Raman temples are the main shrines.

scenes.title: Radha's divine supremacy
scenes.description: The Brahmavaivarta Purana declares Radha supreme even over Krishna — she is Prakriti, the primordial energy, to Krishna's Purusha. She exists before creation and will remain after dissolution.

scenes.title: Radha Kund — the most sacred lake
scenes.description: Radha Kund is considered more sacred than the Ganga itself. Bathing here on Bahula Ashtami (Radha's ashtami) is said to grant the love of Krishna directly.
